templates.name: SLI Category Degraded in Region
templates.template: SLI category '{sli_category}' degraded in region '{region}' for customer '{customer_name}': {distinct_sli_count} SLIs ({sli_category_list}), {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {impacted_resources} resources impacted. Avg value: {avg_value}%, Min value: {min_value}%. Duration: {total_duration_min} min. Severity: {severity_tier}. Observed symptoms: {symptoms}.
templates.extracted_when: A single region shows SLI category degradation for the customer. Only emitted when the same category is NOT also degraded across multiple regions (in which case the cross-region symptom takes over).

templates.name: SLI Category Degraded Across Regions
templates.template: SLI category '{sli_category}' degraded across {distinct_regions} regions for customer '{customer_name}': {region_list}. {distinct_sli_count} SLIs affected ({sli_category_list}), {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources impacted. Avg value: {avg_value}%. This cross-region pattern indicates a widespread platform issue rather than a region-specific problem. Observed symptoms: {symptoms}.
templates.extracted_when: The same SLI category (e.g. Availability, Latency) is breached in 2+ distinct regions for the customer, ruling out region-specific causes and suggesting a global platform or service-level issue.

templates.name: Severe SLI Category Degradation Across Regions
templates.template: SLI category '{sli_category}' shows severe degradation across {distinct_regions} regions for customer '{customer_name}': {region_list}. Avg value: {avg_value}% (near-zero indicates total failure). {distinct_sli_count} SLIs affected ({sli_category_list}), {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources. Severity: CRITICAL. Observed symptoms: {symptoms}.
templates.extracted_when: A cross-region SLI category signal fires with avg_value below 25%, indicating severe or total service failure across multiple regions.

templates.name: Multiple SLI Categories Breached in Region
templates.template: Region '{region}' has {distinct_sli_count} distinct SLIs breached across multiple categories for customer '{customer_name}': {sli_category_list}. {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. Multiple SLI categories failing in the same region points to regional infrastructure stress or a shared dependency failure. Observed symptoms: {symptoms}.
templates.extracted_when: 2+ distinct SLIs (potentially spanning different categories like Availability and Latency) are breached in the same region for the customer, indicating a broader systemic issue rather than a single-SLI anomaly.

templates.name: Broad Regional SLI Failure
templates.template: Region '{region}' has {distinct_sli_count} distinct SLIs breached for customer '{customer_name}': {sli_category_list}. {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions and {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. High SLI count (4+) in a single region indicates a severe regional platform failure — likely infrastructure-level or shared-dependency cascade. Observed symptoms: {symptoms}.
templates.extracted_when: 4+ distinct SLIs are breached in the same region, indicating a broad regional failure beyond isolated service issues.

templates.name: Cross-Customer SLI Degradation in Region
templates.template: SLI category '{sli_category}' degraded across {distinct_customers} customers in region '{region}': {distinct_sli_count} SLIs ({sli_category_list}), {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources. Avg value: {avg_value}%. Cross-customer degradation in the same region confirms a platform-level issue — not customer-specific. Observed symptoms: {symptoms}.
templates.extracted_when: Other customers show SLI degradation in the same region — the multicustomer SLI query shows the same SLI category breached across 3+ subscriptions (belonging to different customers), confirming a platform-level issue.

templates.name: Severe Cross-Customer SLI Degradation
templates.template: SLI category '{sli_category}' severely degraded across {distinct_customers} customers in region '{region}': avg value {avg_value}%. {distinct_sli_count} SLIs ({sli_category_list}), {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources. This severe cross-customer pattern indicates critical platform stress requiring immediate investigation. Observed symptoms: {symptoms}.
templates.extracted_when: Cross-customer degradation with avg value below 50% or 5+ distinct customers affected — indicates critical platform stress beyond isolated regional issues.
